message: Hey everyone. I'm pumped today about our flash sale
You know it's been 56 years since the Beatles released Abbey Road right? My favourite album
56 years already?? Wow that makes me feel old...
Indeed! We're celebrating today by promoting a flash sale on retro items from 1969

Welcome to Bezs Beatles Day, remember communication is key to diagnose the problem.

 *Access game links by pressing the Uptime Labs Logo in the top right of the screen*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin
We're a step closer to allowing folks to pay for items from the 1960s with Bitcoin thanks to Daniel!
Think of it like time travelling!
Wow good work Daniel! Looking forward to seeing it in action in prod
How's the test-driven development going?
TDDs going well. We are as solid as a rock! Though don't ask me what the Liskov Substitution Principle is...
erm - funny you should say that Daniel, I'm just testing my checkout service change in prod and I can't complete the payment - something's up
I hope my checkout service change is all good. Can someone check its not just me? And before you ask, yes I've cleared my cookies
Sorry Daniel it's not looking good on my end either
Uh oh...here we go again
@jay.kabra-zomato.com can you "Size up the Issue" please and keep us informed
From what I can see it looks like we are still getting orders through
Get this sorted ASAP!!!
Checking this
I'm seeing a spike in failed transactions—about 40% of customer payments are not going through right now.

@daniel i can see a changelog of payment service around the same time, can you please check the same CHG89362:PaymentService: v1.8.5 incremental feature release and bug fix to improve card payment reliability.:PROD:Daniel B
Just got a message from my cousin in London, she can't buy any of the new Beatles merch either. Says her payment failed.
:star: Check changes done to the platform
:star: Reviewed changes
I'm noticing the failures seem concentrated in Europe. Looks like the UK is particularly affected.
Give me a second, I'll get the detailed info on each of the changes made today
Hope this helps: https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/OGU1YjE2MmE4ZmI4NGFkMjgzNzEwZGVkYjlmNzgwNWY
Any updates on the investigation?
@daniel can you verify this change and revert this first to confirm if this is what is affecting the production, as i am also not able to go through the payment
My code isn't even being called yet, so I don't think rolling back is necessary.
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
Would make more sense to investigate Shay's change first?
Daniel has a point - let's try Shay's change first before touching the payment service

@shay please check this change of yours in checkout service CHG89360:CheckoutService:Refactoring UI appearances of the checkout button.:PROD:Shay N

It is related to checkout button can we revert this and then reverify the business metrics
I will rollback my checkout change right away
Rollback complete!
Hmm, customer reports are still coming in at the same rate
The failure pattern hasn't changed - still 100% failure in the UK
Something else must be causing this
We need this fixed!
*Incident Number INC1094:* sev2
What is the current impact in terms of affected customers and lost orders? Which regions are experiencing issues? Need numbers.
Since Shay's rollback didn't help, maybe we should look more closely at my change, but I still think the code is solid and was thoroughly tested.
Metrics confirm the issue persists with 100% payment failures in the UK after Shay's rollback.
@tanya can you check this change : CHG89350:PaymentDatabase:version v5.9 deployed:PROD:Tanya ?
I can roll back the PaymentDatabase v5.9 change if you want, just let me know.
Yes let us do the same to rule out this possibility as well
Alright, rolling back the PaymentDatabase change now
Rollback complete.
100% payment failures in UK region, around 20% dip in OPM
Understood. What is the estimated time to resolution? Are we expecting further financial impact if this continues?
:star: Qualify the problem
:star: Formally assign criticality level to the incident
@shay can you check the checkout metrics and opm metrics now?
:star: Manage actions and timings
I've checked the checkout and OPM metrics, and unfortunately there is no improvement—UK payments are still failing at 100%.
Payments are still failing in UK
Customer complaints and failure rates in the UK remain unchanged since the last rollback.
I've double-checked the platform and the PaymentDatabase rollback had no effect on the UK payment failures.
Yes we are trying to resolve it asap, currently UK region payments are completely down
I need a concrete ETA for restoration. Quantify the projected revenue loss per hour if this persists. Keep me updated on any progress.
@tanya @shay can you re check all the platform metrics and point out any anomaly?
I've reviewed the platform metrics and noticed that Daniel's recent change modified shared libraries specifically used in GBP payment flows, which could be impacting UK payments.
I don't see any anomalies in the checkout or OPM metrics outside of the ongoing UK payment failures.
@daniel can you revert this change around modified shared libraries which are specifically used in GBP payment flows
The new code isn't being invoked yet, can I investigate a bit more.
Trying to get this sorted asap
I need specifics, not generalities. What is the hourly revenue loss? When will payments be back online? Update me with real numbers and a timeline.
Yes please dig deep around this once
I'll dig into the logs and trace the shared library calls in the GBP payment flow to see if anything stands out.
:bulb: Restoration over root cause analysis
Okay it looks like it may be related, what should i do?
please revert this asap @daniel
Fine if you insist, I'll rollback
Rolling back my Bitcoin payment service change now
Rollback complete. Might take a few minutes to stabilise
Did that fix it?
@shay @tanya please check if the payments are now sorted in uk reason
:star: Cross checking resolution with team
:bulb: To complete this drill, ask the engineering team to verify the payment service is working, and check with Bob if UK customer payments have recovered.
I'll check the payment service logs now.
I'll try a test transaction from my side.
Logs are looking clean, no more 504 errors.
@bob are the customers not facing the issue anymore around payments in UK?
My test payment went through successfully! Looks like we're back in business.
:star: Cross check resolution with stakeholders
Looking into it now... Metrics seem to be improving!
Customer payments appear to be back up and processing normally
I don't think the Beatles would've anticipated cryptocurrency so let's keep it that way for now
Excellent! Get me a full incident report by end of day
Great work everyone - crisis averted!
Yes 504s are down

Drill Wrap-Up

Thanks for playing! This session is now closed.

Please return to your Uptime Labs tab to review your performance and complete the Retrospective & Feedback form.

If you've already closed the tab, you can reopen the form using the button below.
We are now up and running in UK reason as well
Confirm that payment transactions are processing successfully and revenue flow is fully restored. Are there any residual issues impacting customers?
:star: Confirm resolution with the business
Yes the transactions are now up and running

Thanks for playing! Please complete your feedback here:
https://learn.uptimelabs.io/scenario/online-boutique/levels/5/8451/feedback
Good. Monitor closely and alert me immediately if there are any further disruptions. Prepare a summary of total impact and actions taken for review.
